info.description: Command line interface for creating and managing InterBlaze applications
info.title: InterBlaze CLI Tool

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: InterBlaze CLI - A powerful tool for creating and managing Blazor Microfrontend applications

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a microfrontend to an app shell

options.name: --app-shell
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

options.name: --microfrontend
options.description: Path to the microfrontend directory or package ID

options.name: --route
options.description: Route path to mount the microfrontend on

options.name: --id
options.description: ID to use for the microfrontend in the app shell

options.name: --from-repo
options.description: Download the microfrontend from a package repository

options.name: --repo
options.description: Repository URL to download the microfrontend from

options.name: --version
options.description: Version of the microfrontend package to download

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze InterBlaze project for dependencies and performance

commands.name: bundle
commands.description: Analyze bundle sizes and optimization opportunities

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the app shell project

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format (console, dot, svg, png)
Default value is: console.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path for non-console formats

options.name: --include-shared
options.description: Include shared libraries in the analysis

commands.name: performance
commands.description: Analyze runtime performance of the application

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the app shell project

options.name: --url
options.description: URL of the deployed application to analyze

options.name: --threshold
options.description:
Performance threshold in milliseconds
Default value is: 300.

commands.name: dev
commands.description: Start development server for InterBlaze projects

options.name: --port
options.description:
Port to run the proxy on
Default value is: 5050.

options.name: --add
options.description: Add a proxy route in format 'path=target' (e.g.

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove a proxy route by path

options.name: --port
options.description:
Port to run the server on
Default value is: 5000.

options.name: --host
options.description:
Host to bind the server to
Default value is: localhost.

options.name: --env
options.description:
Environment to use
Default value is: development.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Glob patterns to exclude from watching (comma separated)
Default value is: node_modules,bin,obj,dist.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Glob patterns to include in watching (comma separated)
Default value is:
**/*.{cs,razor,cshtml,js,ts,jsx,tsx,css,scss,html}.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables a microfrontend in an app shell

options.name: --app-shell
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

options.name: --microfrontend
options.description: ID of the microfrontend to disable

commands.name: doc
commands.description: Generate documentation for your InterBlaze project

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the app shell project

options.name: --type
options.description:
Diagram type (architecture, flow, component, all)
Default value is: all.

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format (svg, png, puml)
Default value is: svg.

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format (pdf, docx, epub)
Default value is: pdf.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the app shell project

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format (html, markdown, pdf)
Default value is: html.

options.name: --theme
options.description:
Documentation theme (default, dark, light, custom)
Default value is: default.

options.name: --logo
options.description: Path to logo file to include in documentation

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables a microfrontend in an app shell

options.name: --app-shell
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

options.name: --microfrontend
options.description: ID of the microfrontend to enable

commands.name: env
commands.description: Manage environment configurations for your InterBlaze project

options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format (json, dotenv, xml)
Default value is: json.

options.name: --compact
options.description: Export in compact format without comments

options.name: --include-secrets
options.description: Include secrets in the exported configuration

options.name: --from
options.description: Copy settings from another environment as a starting point

options.name: --vars
options.description: Additional variables in key=value format, separated by commas

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Lists microfrontends in an app shell or available from a
repository

commands.name: local
commands.description: Lists microfrontends in an app shell

options.name: --app-shell
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

options.name: --detailed
options.description: Show detailed information for each microfrontend

commands.name: repo
commands.description: Lists available microfrontends from a repository

options.name: --repo
options.description:
Repository URL to list microfrontends from
Default value is: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert existing Blazor applications to microfrontends

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the Blazor project to convert

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for the converted microfrontend

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Run in interactive mode with prompts

commands.name: upgrade
commands.description: Upgrade InterBlaze projects to newer versions

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be changed without making changes

options.name: --force
options.description: Force upgrade even if there are warnings

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new app shell or microfrontend

options.name: --template
options.description:
Template to use (EmptyServer, EmptyWebAssembly, EmptyMaui,
SampleServer, SampleWebAssembly, SampleMaui)
Default value is: EmptyServer.

options.name: --with-mf
options.description:
Add sample microfrontends (blazor, blazormaui, react, python,
all)

options.name: --template
options.description:
Template to use (Blazor, BlazorMaui, React, Python)
Default value is: Blazor.

options.name: --language
options.description:
For React: JavaScript or TypeScript
Default value is: JavaScript.

options.name: --use-jsx
options.description: For React: Whether to use JSX/TSX syntax

options.name: --css-framework
options.description:
For React: CSS framework (Bootstrap, TailwindCSS, None)
Default value is: Bootstrap.

options.name: --framework
options.description:
For Python: Web framework (Flask, Django)
Default value is: Flask.

options.name: --include-database
options.description: For Python: Whether to include database integration

options.name: --database-type
options.description:
For Python: Database type (SQLite, PostgreSQL)
Default value is: SQLite.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publishes an app shell or microfrontend as a NuGet package

commands.name: app-shell
commands.description: Publishes an app shell as a NuGet package

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

commands.name: microfrontend
commands.description: Publishes a microfrontend as a NuGet package

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Removes a microfrontend from an app shell

options.name: --app-shell
options.description: Path to the app shell directory

options.name: --microfrontend
options.description: ID of the microfrontend to remove

options.name: --disable-only
options.description: Only disable the microfrontend instead of removing it

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Scaffold components and features for your InterBlaze project

options.name: --path
options.description: Target path for the blueprint output

options.name: --vars
options.description: Variables for the blueprint in format key1=value1,key2=value2

options.name: --type
options.description:
Component type (Page, Layout, Control, Form)
Default value is: Control.

options.name: --with-tests
options.description: Generate test files for the component

options.name: --with-styles
options.description: Generate style files for the component

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Scaffold a complete feature with related components

options.name: --type
options.description:
Feature type (CRUD, Dashboard, Authentication, Report)
Default value is: CRUD.

options.name: --with-tests
options.description: Generate test files for the feature

options.name: --with-api
options.description: Generate API endpoints for the feature

options.name: --with-store
options.description: Generate state management for the feature

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new project from a template

options.name: --options
options.description: Additional options in key=value format, separated by commas

options.name: --type
options.description:
Template type (appshell or microfrontend)
Default value is: all.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Run tests and diagnostics on your InterBlaze project

commands.name: diagnose
commands.description: Diagnose common issues in your InterBlaze project

options.name: --blame
options.description: Enable blame mode to identify problematic tests

options.name: --collect
options.description: Data collector for the test run

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the app shell project
